title: to V 作主詞／動名詞作主詞

formulas.zh: 不定詞作主詞，後接be動詞和形容詞
動名詞作主詞，後接be動詞和形容詞
虛主詞it，後接形容詞和不定詞，表示真正主詞

explanation: 不定詞或動名詞可作句子主詞，兩者語法功能相同但語態略有差異。不定詞偏向具體單一動作，常用虛主詞it取代以簡化句式；動名詞偏向習慣性或抽象概念，較口語自然。兩種形式在學測中均為常考重點。虛主詞it結構特別常見，能使句子表達更簡潔優雅，避免句首過重。

examples.eng: To learn English is necessary for your future career development.
examples.chi: 學習英文對你的未來職業發展是必要的。

examples.eng: Reading books regularly can improve your knowledge and vocabulary skills.
examples.chi: 定期閱讀書籍可以提升你的知識和詞彙能力。

examples.eng: It is important to protect the environment for future generations.
examples.chi: 保護環境對子孫後代來說很重要。

examples.eng: It is challenging to achieve success without persistence and hard work.
examples.chi: 在沒有堅持和努力的情況下取得成功是有挑戰性的。

extension.tip: 判斷時注意：(1)不定詞To V強調單一具體動作，常與重要性、必要性等詞搭配；(2)動名詞V-ing表習慣或抽象概念，較口語；(3)虛主詞it使句子簡潔優雅，常用於正式書面語。

examples.test: To study abroad is my dream.
examples.result: → 正確。不定詞作主詞，強調具體單一動作（去國外唸書）
→ 正確。動名詞作主詞，同樣可接受，但較口語自然

examples.test: It is my dream to study abroad.
examples.result: → 正確。虛主詞it使主詞後置，句式更優雅簡潔

extension.note: 記憶口訣：『不定詞單一明確，動名詞習慣抽象，虛主詞it最優雅』

parts: is beneficial for developing critical thinking skills.
exercises.sentence: Reading widely is beneficial for developing critical thinking skills.
exercises.translation: 廣泛閱讀對發展批判性思維能力很有益處。

parts: to balance work and family life in modern society.
exercises.sentence: It is challenging to balance work and family life in modern society.
exercises.translation: 在現代社會中平衡工作和家庭生活是有挑戰性的。

parts: English fluently opens many doors for your career opportunities.
exercises.sentence: To speak English fluently opens many doors for your career opportunities.
exercises.translation: 能流暢地說英文為你的職業機會打開許多大門。

parts: to establish good habits when you are young and energetic.
exercises.sentence: It is essential to establish good habits when you are young and energetic.
exercises.translation: 在年輕精力充沛時養成良好習慣是必不可少的。
